name: La Revuelta El Médano
address: Av. José Miguel Galván Bello, 23, 38612 El Médano, Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: 4.8 stars, 98 reviews. Wine, gastro food and reportedly vinyl records — a proper little gem in El Médano. Open daily, morning and evening.

name: Marisquería Agua y Sal
address: C. Callao Hondo, 22, 38588 San Miguel de Tajao, Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: 4.5 stars, 6629 reviews — seriously well reviewed seafood restaurant. In San Miguel de Tajao, a tiny fishing village about 10 mins from the south airport. Open Wed–Sun from 12:30pm. Closed Monday and Tuesday.

name: La Mordidita
address: Pl. de Ireneo Gonzalez, 10, 38002 Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: 4.5 stars, 455 reviews. On the same plaza as Gastrobar Cortxo — great little spot for lunch or dinner. Open Tue–Sat 1:30pm–10:30pm. Closed Sunday and Monday.

name: Kebab Alhambra Santa Cruz
address: Pl. San Juan Bautista, 4, 38005 Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: 4.6 stars, 352 reviews. Late night kebab spot open until midnight every day. Near Tomé Cano car park — good location for a night-time stop.

name: Cafetería Olisero
address: C. Heliodoro Rodríguez López, 22, Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: Opens 6:30am weekdays, 7:30am Saturday. Reliable local cafetería with 232 reviews.

name: La Boqueria Taberna El Médano
address: C. Iriarte, 14, 38612 El Médano, Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: 4.7 stars, 629 reviews. Excellent taberna in El Médano. Open Thursday evenings from 7pm. Closed Monday and Tuesday.

name: CRUDO Bar
address: Calle Clavel, 9, 38002 Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: Craft cocktail bar with serious soul — coctelería de autor, live music events including regular jam sessions, and a proper late-night vibe. Open until 2am Mon–Thu, 3:30am Fri–Sat. One of the best bars in Santa Cruz.

name: Restaurante Veinte 04 Surf Cafe
address: Calle Hno Pedro, 2, 38612 El Médano, Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: 4 stars, 1657 reviews. Surf cafe right in El Médano, opens 9am every day. Great atmosphere, outdoor seating, popular with locals and surfers.

name: Restaurante Manglar
address: Plaza de España Pabellón 2, 38003 Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: 4.1 stars, 378 reviews. Right on Plaza de España — great location by the seafront. Open Tue–Sun from 12:30pm. Closed Monday.

name: Bodegón El Puntero
address: Calle San Clemente, 13, 38003 Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: A proper Canarian bodegón — bacalao, pulpo and dorada done right, at prices that won't hurt. 4.6 on Google from 605 reviews. Local, rustic, no fuss. Open Tuesday–Saturday 12:30pm–4:15pm and 8pm–10:30pm. Closed Monday and Sunday.

name: Gastrobar Cortxo
address: Pl. de Ireneo Gonzalez, 5, 38003 Santa Cruz de Tenerife
summary: 4.4 stars, 1026 reviews. Gastrobar on a plaza in central Santa Cruz. Open Tue–Sat 1:30pm–11pm. Closed Sunday and Monday.
